presentation.title: RA-SPIKE Week 1 Day 1 — Start With You

slides.title: Rookie Academy — SPIKE Edition
slides.body: An 8-week journey to build your business and master the art of advising. Build Yourself. Build Your Business. Build Your Legacy.
slides.speakerNotes: Open with energy. Welcome the cohort to RA-SPIKE. Frame the program as an 8-week journey, not a one-day orientation.
discussionQuestions: What does 'build yourself before you build your business' mean to you?

slides.title: Program pillars
slides.body: Discover your purpose. Design your business. Deliver impact.
slides.speakerNotes: Walk the three pillars: Build Yourself, Build Your Business, Build Your Legacy. Week 1 is entirely about the first pillar.

slides.title: Welcome to a different kind of Rookie Academy
slides.body: This is not traditional product training. RA-SPIKE starts with you as the entrepreneur.
slides.speakerNotes: Set expectations: this academy is different because it starts with identity and purpose, not product features.
discussionQuestions: What have other trainings focused on that this one might not?

slides.title: Week 1 — Start With You
slides.body: Build yourself before you build your business.
slides.speakerNotes: State the Week 1 theme clearly. Everything today feeds the YOU block of the Financial Entrepreneurship Canvas.

slides.title: Why RA-SPIKE?
slides.body: We start with you. Everything else follows: You → Purpose → Business → Clients → Impact.
slides.speakerNotes: Contrast traditional training (starts at product/clients) with RA-SPIKE (starts at YOU). Emphasize the top-down order.
discussionQuestions: Where have you seen training start at the bottom instead of with the person?

slides.title: Your 8-week journey
slides.body: Weeks 1–3 Discover. Week 4 Business Plan & Pitch. Weeks 5–7 Advise. Week 8 Advisor Revalida.
slides.speakerNotes: Give a 2-minute roadmap. Today is Discover / Build Yourself only. Do not deep-dive later weeks.

slides.title: Reflection — What kind of life do you want to build?
slides.body: Take a few minutes. Write it down.
slides.speakerNotes: Silent writing for 3–5 minutes. No sharing required yet. Collect energy for the Dream Board later.
discussionQuestions: What one sentence captures the life you want to build?

slides.title: Why do people become financial advisors?
slides.body: Quick poll: Income, Freedom, Family, Purpose, Career, Entrepreneurship, Helping Others, Legacy.
slides.speakerNotes: Run a raise-your-hand poll for each reason. Affirm that all reasons are valid. Link answers to Dream Board themes.
discussionQuestions: What is your top reason for becoming a financial advisor?

slides.title: The entrepreneur mindset
slides.body: Employee → Self-employed → Financial entrepreneur. We are here to build businesses, not only careers.
slides.speakerNotes: Walk the three stages. Position participants as CEOs of their future advisory business.
discussionQuestions: Where are you on this path today — employee, self-employed, or financial entrepreneur?

slides.title: Financial Entrepreneurship Canvas (FEC)
slides.body: Your business blueprint over four weeks. Today we only begin with YOU (Entrepreneur).
slides.speakerNotes: Preview the six canvas blocks. Lock icons for weeks 2–4. Stress that Week 1 is only the YOU column.

slides.title: Dream Board workshop
slides.body: Choose images and words. Create a collage. Focus on what matters most to you. First input into the FEC.
slides.speakerNotes: Launch Dream Board Studio in the portal. There are no wrong dreams. Circulate and coach individuals.
discussionQuestions: Which image on your board represents your biggest dream?

slides.title: Your business blueprint — Week 1 YOU
slides.body: Week 1 focus: Vision, Purpose, Values, Strengths, Goals. Next week: your ideal customer.
slides.speakerNotes: Connect Dream Board outputs to Vision / Purpose / Values / Strengths / Goals. Preview Week 2 customer work.
discussionQuestions: Which of Vision, Purpose, Values, Strengths, or Goals feels clearest for you today?

slides.title: Assignment before Week 2
slides.body: 1) Finish Dream Board. 2) Write future-self letter (3 years). 3) Bring one printed or digital photo. 4) Think about who you would love to help.
slides.speakerNotes: Read all four assignments aloud. Confirm portal Dream Board is the primary deliverable. Future-self letter and photo are for Week 2 kickoff.
